<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the Monolog package. * * (c) Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Monolog\Handler; use Monolog\Processor\ProcessorInterface; use Monolog\LogRecord; /** * Interface to describe loggers that have processors * * @author Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> */ interface ProcessableHandlerInterface { /** * Adds a processor in the stack. * * @phpstan-param ProcessorInterface|(callable(LogRecord): LogRecord) $callback * * @param ProcessorInterface|callable $callback * @return HandlerInterface self */ public function pushProcessor(callable $callback): HandlerInterface; /** * Removes the processor on top of the stack and returns it. * * @phpstan-return ProcessorInterface|(callable(LogRecord): LogRecord) $callback * * @throws \LogicException In case the processor stack is empty * @return callable|ProcessorInterface */ public function popProcessor(): callable; }
